name: the-real-snipeit-mcp
description: MCP server for the Snipe-IT REST API (100% coverage, read + write).

user_config.title: Snipe-IT API Token
user_config.description: Personal API token (JWT) from Snipe-IT > User > Manage API Keys.

user_config.title: Confirm destructive writes
user_config.description: If true, destructive tools require confirm: "YES".
